name: Quick Pizza Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a large cookie sheet lightly.
3. Unroll the dough from the can onto the greased cookie sheet, forming a 12x9-inch rectangle.
4. Brush the dough with margarine.
5. In a small bowl, combine shredded Provolone cheese, grated Romano cheese, dried basil leaves, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper; mix well.
6. Sprinkle the mixture evenly over the dough.
7. Using a pizza cutter or knife, cut the dough crosswise into 12 strips, each about 1-inch wide.
8. Cut the rectangle in half lengthwise to form an additional 12 strips, keeping them together.
9. Bake for 10-13 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. To separate the strips, recut along the perforations.
11. Serve immediately. If desired, serve with warm pizza sauce.
